elements.name: readout-title
elements.text: The project is in a credible AI iteration phase.
elements.textPreview: The project is in a credible AI iteration phase.

lines.text: The project is in a credible AI iteration

paragraphs.text: The project is in a credible AI iteration phase.

runs.text: The project is in a credible AI iteration phase.

elements.name: readout-subtitle
elements.text: The current ROM already builds and already has a split boss AI overlay. The plan is not a rewrite. It is a sequence of small, audited heuristics that improve move quality while preserving fairness.

children.name: readout-title
children.text: The project is in a credible AI iteration phase.

children.name: readout-subtitle
children.text: The current ROM already builds and already has a split boss AI overlay. The plan is not a rewrite. It is a sequence of small, audited heuristics that improve move quality while preserving fairness.
Normal build produced pokegold.gbc and pokesilver.gbc during the planning pass.
Move scoring, switching, public threat masks, lookahead, and weighted best-vs-second selection already exist.
Public revealed-spinner hazard retention is the first planned implementation; it is not implemented yet.
